title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Adda247 Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Adda247 Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Adda247 Global Group family as a Curriculum Developer in Vadodara. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Adda247 Global Group:
Adda247 Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adda247 Global Group!
